Acme Cloud Services Image

This Export Failure alert is to inform you that a user is experiencing persistent issues with exporting reports to PDF format in your enterprise cloud-based application.

User: user@acme.co (user@acme.co)

Issue: Intermittent failure to export user-generated reports to PDF

Date: Wed, Nov 15 2023 14:30 UTC

You have received this important update about your Acme Cloud Services account because you are the designated admin recipient for this alert type. You can turn off these alerts or change the email recipients in the Notifications section of the Admin Console.

Acme LLC 123 Innovation Drive Tech City, TC 12345

--
